description_long: This kiosk features a striking geometric design with a vertically stacked, faceted wooden structure, composed of three main segments that taper and expand in an alternating pattern. The exterior is clad in a warm, medium-brown wood finish, with large, irregularly shaped glass or transparent panels set into each segment, allowing visibility and light to pass through. The central section includes a prominent open bay or service window, likely intended for customer interaction. The overall form is hexagonal in cross-section, giving it a modern, sculptural appearance. The kiosk stands on a flat base and appears tall enough for a person to stand inside comfortably. Adjacent to the kiosk is a smaller, rectangular object with a black and white pattern, possibly a sign or auxiliary structure.
description: A tall, faceted wooden kiosk with large glass panels and a central open service bay, featuring a modern geometric design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular wooden structure and multiple glass panels, with the open bay partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open service bay at the center, with a person for scale and the auxiliary object nearby.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the geometric wood and glass pattern, with the auxiliary object more prominently visible.
description_view_3: Rear or angled view showing the closed glass panels and the kiosk's full height, with a person walking past.
attribute_window_presence: Multiple windows; located on all sides; irregular polygonal shape.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway; located at the front center.
attribute_roof_design: Flat hexagonal roof; wood material; no overhang or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern geometric with sculptural and minimalist influences.
